text:
.
• Auto ancillaries, continue to do very well. Shares and quarterly profit will touch all time
in these sectors. Tyres will have only very marginal growth and it can even dip further in
the bourses.
• Cars- many Indians will be first time car owners. There will be a boom in the car
market, which will be indicated with as a separate story. High end cars will show slow
growth. Ford cars in Maraimalainagar will need to do some vastu alterations to make its
place profitable. As far as four wheeler segments is concerned, Maruthi will still hold the
sway. The other companies in the lower end and beginning segment of the market will
also do well. The high end segment car will register ordinary growth only.
• Pharma- my favorite sector. It will be a good story but not a boom story. Most of them
will have positive story. Ranbaxy Company, which has had major set backs will slowly
bounce back. India companies will continue to export in a major way. - TRUE
